inputs.label: Net Weight Target
inputs.businessContext: The desired net weight of the product as per label.

inputs.label: Tare Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the empty packaging or container.

inputs.label: Process Standard Deviation
inputs.businessContext: Standard deviation of the fill weight from process capability studies.

inputs.label: Safety Factor (z-score)
inputs.businessContext: Number of standard deviations to add to ensure compliance (e.g., 2 for ~97.7% one-sided confidence).
